codeReview.summary: Pass. Commit 81298fb only expands EditorView IPC coverage, and the reviewed implementation in EditorView.tsx and scriptStore.ts satisfies VAL-EDIT-005, VAL-EDIT-006, VAL-EDIT-013, and VAL-EDIT-014: Open routes through openFromDisk to read_script, Save routes through saveToDisk to save_script, Go Live awaits enter_teleprompter_mode before register_hotkeys, shows an alert on failure, and resets playing to false on success.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-redesign skill's mandatory RED-phase instruction is too rigid for validation-only features whose implementation already exists; this worker's task was to add explicit coverage for existing behavior, so the tests passed immediately instead of going red first.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: D:\coding\somewhat\.factory\skills\frontend-redesign\SKILL.md:41-45 requires a failing RED run before implementation, but the handoff for 7e9a1494-7984-4322-a7ce-3b57f843dd4f states the implementation was already complete and the RED/GREEN phases collapsed because the tests passed immediately.

summary: Reviewed the transcript skeleton, handoff, shared-state docs, and commit 81298fb. The feature passes: the underlying EditorView/scriptStore behavior matches the contract and the added tests cover the required Open, Save, Go Live payload, failure, ordering, and playing-reset flows.
